basic_details.job_title: ESSO NCPOR Joint Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: ESSO-National Centre for Polar & Ocean Research (NCPOR)
basic_details.short_information: Here is a quick summary table of NCPOR Joint Manager (Administration) Recruitment 2026 for candidates to get all the key details at a glance.

application_fee.details: The official NCPOR recruitment notification (Advt. No. NCPOR/2026/06) does not specify any application fee details for the Joint Manager (Administration) post. Candidates are advised to check the official online application portal at the time of applying for any updates regarding application fee, if applicable.

age_limit.details: The upper age limit for the Joint Manager (Administration) post is 40 years, reckoned as on the cut-off date of 20 August 2026. Age relaxation is applicable as follows: | As per Government of India norms for Ex-Servicemen and PwD candidates Up to 5 years for persons serving on a regular basis in Government Organizations/Autonomous Bodies/PSUs, and employees working in NCPOR | Candidates seeking age relaxation must produce the relevant certificate in support of their claim.

qualification.details: Candidates must be Indian Nationals and fulfil the following educational qualification, experience, and age criteria to be eligible for the NCPOR Joint Manager (Administration) post. | Essential Qualification: | A Master's degree from a recognized University Operational computer knowledge 4 years of experience, preferably in Government/PSU/Autonomous Bodies in the relevant area, at Pay Level 7/8 (Grade Pay Rs. 4600/4800) as per 7th CPC or its equivalent | Desirable Qualification: | MBA/CA/ICWA/SAS or equivalent Proficiency in ERP systems, financial management software, and standard computer applications Experience in administrative functions within a Government department, PSU, or Government organisation, OR experience in finance and accounting within a government system Deep understanding of Government of India rules, CCS (Conduct) Rules, General Financial Rules (GFR), Delegation of Financial Powers Rules, and related instructions | Experience means relevant field experience acquired from a Government/Semi-Government/Autonomous/Research Organization after obtaining the minimum educational qualification, and must be supported by documentary proof clearly indicating duties performed and dates of joining and relieving. | The selected candidate will be responsible for administrative and finance matters of NCPOR and will be required to advise the Director on these matters. The role also involves maintaining liaison with the parent Ministry and undertaking any additional responsibilities assigned by the Director, NCPOR, from time to time.

salary_details.details: The Joint Manager (Administration) post carries Pay Level 10 as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC). In addition to the basic pay, the post carries usual allowances such as Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA), Travelling Allowance (TA), Leave Travel Concession (LTC), Children Education Allowance, National Pension System (NPS), medical facilities, and leave, as admissible to Society employees from time to time. | The post is on a regular basis, with a minimum probation period of 2 years. The place of posting is currently NCPOR, Goa, with transfer liability to any part of India.

selection_process: Selection for the Joint Manager (Administration) post will be based on screening of applications followed by an interview. Key points regarding the selection process include:
Mere fulfilment of the prescribed essential qualification and experience does not entitle a candidate to be called for interview. If a large number of applications are received
NCPOR may restrict the number of candidates called for interview based on desirable qualifications

or any other benchmark decided by the screening committee. NCPOR has full discretion to fix separate minimum criteria for shortlisting and interview. Candidates working in Government/PSU/Autonomous Bodies must produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their employer at the time of interview. Original certificates must be produced at the time of interview; non-production of originals will lead to disqualification.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates can apply for the NCPOR Joint Manager (Administration) post by following these steps:
Visit the official NCPOR website at https://ncpor.res.in/ or the direct application link https://onlineform.ncpor.res.in/jm_ncpor_2026/
Register on the online recruitment portal using a valid and active e-mail address
Activate the registration by clicking the activation link sent to the registered e-mail (check the spam folder if not received in the inbox)
Log in and fill in the online application form carefully with accurate personal, educational, and experience details
Upload legible scanned copies of all required documents in PDF format (25 KB to 300 KB) and photograph/signature in JPG/PNG format (10 KB to 30 KB)
Review all details carefully, as the online application form is not editable after final submission
Submit the application well before the last date and time
Retain the acknowledgement e-mail and a printout of the finally submitted application for future reference
Candidates are NOT required to send any hard copy of the application by post or e-mail.
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply for this post. Candidates working in Government/PSU/Autonomous Bodies should apply through the proper channel. Canvassing in any form, or bringing any influence, political or otherwise, will be treated as disqualification of candidature. Any discrepancies found in the certificates will attract disqualification of the application. Director, NCPOR reserves the right to fill up or not fill up the post, or to cancel the recruitment process at any stage, without assigning any reason. Selected candidates may have to join the post immediately on being found fit by a Medical Authority. No interim enquiries, correspondence, or communication regarding the recruitment will be entertained. Candidates need to make their own accommodation arrangements, if called for interview. Addendum/corrigendum, if any, will be published only on the official NCPOR website. For technical difficulties in submitting the online application, contact the IT cell at [email protected]. For other recruitment-related queries, contact the recruitment cell at [email protected].

content_sections.heading: NCPOR Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Here is a quick summary table of NCPOR Joint Manager (Administration) Recruitment 2026 for candidates to get all the key details at a glance.

rows.details: ESSO-National Centre for Polar & Ocean Research (NCPOR)

content_sections.heading: NCPOR Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
content_sections.text: This last date also serves as the cut-off date for all purposes, including calculation of age, qualification, and experience. Candidates are advised to submit their online application well in advance.

rows.event: Last date for submission of online application

content_sections.heading: NCPOR Joint Manager (Administration) Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: NCPOR has notified 1 regular vacancy for the post of Joint Manager (Administration) under the Unreserved (UR) category, to be filled through Direct Recruitment.

content_sections.heading: NCPOR Joint Manager Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must be Indian Nationals and fulfil the following educational qualification, experience, and age criteria to be eligible for the NCPOR Joint Manager (Administration) post. Essential Qualification: A Master's degree from a recognized University Operational computer knowledge 4 years of experience, preferably in Government/PSU/Autonomous Bodies in the relevant area, at Pay Level 7/8 (Grade Pay Rs. 4600/4800) as per 7th CPC or its equivalent Desirable Qualification: MBA/CA/ICWA/SAS or equivalent Proficiency in ERP systems, financial management software, and standard computer applications Experience in administrative functions within a Government department, PSU, or Government organisation, OR experience in finance and accounting within a government system Deep understanding of Government of India rules, CCS (Conduct) Rules, General Financial Rules (GFR), Delegation of Financial Powers Rules, and related instructions Experience means relevant field experience acquired from a Government/Semi-Government/Autonomous/Research Organization after obtaining the minimum educational qualification, and must be supported by documentary proof clearly indicating duties performed and dates of joining and relieving. The selected candidate will be responsible for administrative and finance matters of NCPOR and will be required to advise the Director on these matters. The role also involves maintaining liaison with the parent Ministry and undertaking any additional responsibilities assigned by the Director, NCPOR, from time to time.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: The upper age limit for the Joint Manager (Administration) post is 40 years, reckoned as on the cut-off date of 20 August 2026. Age relaxation is applicable as follows: As per Government of India norms for Ex-Servicemen and PwD candidates Up to 5 years for persons serving on a regular basis in Government Organizations/Autonomous Bodies/PSUs, and employees working in NCPOR Candidates seeking age relaxation must produce the relevant certificate in support of their claim.

content_sections.heading: NCPOR Joint Manager Salary / Pay Level 2026
content_sections.text: The Joint Manager (Administration) post carries Pay Level 10 as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC). In addition to the basic pay, the post carries usual allowances such as Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA), Travelling Allowance (TA), Leave Travel Concession (LTC), Children Education Allowance, National Pension System (NPS), medical facilities, and leave, as admissible to Society employees from time to time. The post is on a regular basis, with a minimum probation period of 2 years. The place of posting is currently NCPOR, Goa, with transfer liability to any part of India.

content_sections.heading: NCPOR Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: The official NCPOR recruitment notification (Advt. No. NCPOR/2026/06) does not specify any application fee details for the Joint Manager (Administration) post. Candidates are advised to check the official online application portal at the time of applying for any updates regarding application fee, if applicable.

content_sections.heading: NCPOR Joint Manager Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Selection for the Joint Manager (Administration) post will be based on screening of applications followed by an interview. Key points regarding the selection process include: Mere fulfilment of the prescribed essential qualification and experience does not entitle a candidate to be called for interview. If a large number of applications are received, NCPOR may restrict the number of candidates called for interview based on desirable qualifications, academic performance, relevant experience, or any other benchmark decided by the screening committee. NCPOR has full discretion to fix separate minimum criteria for shortlisting and interview. Candidates working in Government/PSU/Autonomous Bodies must produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their employer at the time of interview. Original certificates must be produced at the time of interview; non-production of originals will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for NCPOR Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must upload scanned copies of the following documents while submitting the online application: Certificates relating to educational qualification (Master's degree and other relevant qualifications) Experience certificates clearly mentioning duties/job/work undertaken, date of joining, and date of relieving Age proof documents Caste certificate, if applicable Disability certificate, for PwD candidates claiming relaxation Ex-servicemen certificate, if applicable No Objection Certificate (NOC) from employer, for candidates in Government/PSU/Autonomous Bodies (to be produced at the time of interview) Recent passport-size photograph and signature (in JPG/PNG format, 10 KB to 30 KB) Translated certificates, if original documents are in a language other than English or Hindi All documents must be uploaded in PDF format with a file size between 25 KB and 300 KB. Applications without legible photo, signature, or scanned copies of supporting certificates will be summarily rejected.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NCPOR Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates can apply for the NCPOR Joint Manager (Administration) post by following these steps: Visit the official NCPOR website at https://ncpor.res.in/ or the direct application link https://onlineform.ncpor.res.in/jm_ncpor_2026/ Register on the online recruitment portal using a valid and active e-mail address Activate the registration by clicking the activation link sent to the registered e-mail (check the spam folder if not received in the inbox) Log in and fill in the online application form carefully with accurate personal, educational, and experience details Upload legible scanned copies of all required documents in PDF format (25 KB to 300 KB) and photograph/signature in JPG/PNG format (10 KB to 30 KB) Review all details carefully, as the online application form is not editable after final submission Submit the application well before the last date and time Retain the acknowledgement e-mail and a printout of the finally submitted application for future reference Candidates are NOT required to send any hard copy of the application by post or e-mail.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for NCPOR Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply for this post. Candidates working in Government/PSU/Autonomous Bodies should apply through the proper channel. Canvassing in any form, or bringing any influence, political or otherwise, will be treated as disqualification of candidature. Any discrepancies found in the certificates will attract disqualification of the application. Director, NCPOR reserves the right to fill up or not fill up the post, or to cancel the recruitment process at any stage, without assigning any reason. Selected candidates may have to join the post immediately on being found fit by a Medical Authority. No interim enquiries, correspondence, or communication regarding the recruitment will be entertained. Candidates need to make their own accommodation arrangements, if called for interview. Addendum/corrigendum, if any, will be published only on the official NCPOR website. For technical difficulties in submitting the online application, contact the IT cell at [email protected] . For other recruitment-related queries, contact the recruitment cell at [email protected] .

faq.question: Q1. What is NCPOR Recruitment 2026 about?
faq.answer: NCPOR Recruitment 2026 (Advt. No. NCPOR/2026/06) is a notification inviting online applications for 1 regular vacancy of Joint Manager (Administration) at ESSO-National Centre for Polar & Ocean Research, Goa.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in NCPOR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy notified for the Joint Manager (Administration) post, under the Unreserved (UR) category.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for NCPOR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application is 20 August 2026 (Thursday) by 5:00 PM, which is also the cut-off date for age, qualification, and experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for NCPOR Joint Manager (Administration) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Master's degree from a recognized University, have operational computer knowledge, and possess 4 years of relevant experience, preferably in Government/PSU/Autonomous Bodies at Pay Level 7/8 or equivalent.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for NCPOR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 40 years, with relaxation as per Government of India norms for Ex-Servicemen and PwD candidates, and up to 5 years for those serving regularly in Government Organizations/Autonomous Bodies/PSUs/NCPOR.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary/pay level for the NCPOR Joint Manager (Administration) post?
faq.answer: The post carries Pay Level 10 as per the 7th CPC, along with usual allowances such as DA, HRA, TA, LTC, Children Education Allowance, NPS, and medical facilities.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for NCPOR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any application fee for this post. Candidates should check the official application portal for updates, if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for NCPOR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply only online through www.ncpor.res.in or the direct application link, by registering, filling the application form, and uploading the required documents. No hard copy is required.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for NCPOR Joint Manager (Administration) post?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on screening of applications followed by an interview, as decided by NCPOR's screening committee.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the NCPOR Joint Manager (Administration) job location?
faq.answer: The job location is currently NCPOR, Headland Sada, Mormugao, Vasco-da-Gama, Goa, with transfer liability to any part of India.
